prompt: An assembly robot welds metal frames while a quality inspection drone hovers to scan the joints. The drone can start scanning only after welding is complete. If temperature exceeds 90°C, welding must pause until it drops below 70°C.

WelderBot pauses welding when temperature exceeds 90°C
WelderBot resumes welding when temperature drops below 70°C
